frames.description: Initial frame showing a street scene in front of a large institutional building with a light green upper facade and brick-red lower facade. The building has dark dome-like structures on top. Several pedestrians are walking along the sidewalk or sitting on the building's front steps.
frames.signs: None clearly legible in this frame.
frames.vehicles: Partial view of a white car on the bottom left.
frames.pedestrians: A man in a grey shirt and another in a pink outfit are walking left; others are sitting near the building entrance.
frames.infrastructure: A tall street light pole is on the right. institutional building with traditional architecture elements.
frames.motion: The camera is moving forward, panned slightly towards the right side of the street.

frames.description: The camera continues moving past the same building. A motorcycle enters the frame from the bottom right corner.
frames.vehicles: A motorcycle with two riders is entering from the right foreground.
frames.pedestrians: People continue walking and sitting on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The motorcycle from the previous frame has moved further left. A man in a white shirt and pants is walking across the road from right to left.
frames.vehicles: The motorcycle with two riders continues moving across the frame to the left.
frames.pedestrians: Man in white walking across the road; others on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The man in white is now center-frame. More pedestrians are visible on the sidewalk in the background.
frames.vehicles: Motorcycle has moved out of view to the left.
frames.pedestrians: Man in white continues his walk across the road.

frames.description: The man in white is now towards the left side of the frame. The camera is still passing the long building.
frames.pedestrians: The man in white walking left; group of people near the entrance in the distance.

frames.description: An auto-rickshaw enters the frame from the right. The man in white has moved further left.
frames.signs: The auto-rickshaw's windshield has Odia text: 'ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର' (Bhubaneswar). Its license plate is 'OD 02 AE 3662'.
frames.pedestrians: Man in white continues walking; people sitting on building steps.
frames.motion: The auto-rickshaw is moving left across the frame.

frames.description: The auto-rickshaw is now center-left. The camera maintains its forward trajectory.
frames.pedestrians: Man in white is near the left edge of the frame.

frames.description: A man on a bicycle enters from the left foreground. The auto-rickshaw is moving out of the frame on the left.
frames.vehicles: Man on a bicycle; auto-rickshaw exiting.
frames.pedestrians: A man in a grey shirt and others on the sidewalk.
frames.motion: Cyclist moving right; camera moving forward.

frames.description: The bicyclist is now center-frame. Pedestrians on the sidewalk are more clearly visible.
frames.pedestrians: People walking on the sidewalk in the background.

frames.description: The bicyclist has moved to the right. A motorcycle with a rider in a red shirt enters from the left background.
frames.vehicles: Bicycle moving right; motorcycle in background.
frames.pedestrians: People sitting and walking on the sidewalk.

frames.description: A scooter with two riders enters from the bottom left foreground. Pedestrians are scattered along the building's frontage.
frames.pedestrians: Two women on the scooter; others on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The scooter riders are moving past the camera's view. More pedestrians are visible further down the street.
frames.pedestrians: People walking on the sidewalk.

frames.description: Another bicyclist enters from the left foreground. The building facade continues on the right.
frames.vehicles: Man on a bicycle moving right.
frames.pedestrians: People walking on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The bicyclist is crossing the frame. The camera is approaching a section of the building with more activity.
frames.pedestrians: Several people walking or standing near the building entrance.

frames.description: A motorcycle with three riders (including a woman in a pink saree) enters from the bottom right corner.
frames.pedestrians: Riders on the motorcycle; others on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The motorcycle with the woman in pink is now center-left. The institutional building facade remains constant on the right.
frames.pedestrians: People on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The motorcycle from before has exited. A man in a checkered shirt enters from the bottom left, walking towards the right.
frames.pedestrians: Man in a checkered shirt walking right; others in background.

frames.description: The man in the checkered shirt is center-frame. The scene remains focused on the street in front of the building.
frames.pedestrians: Man in checkered shirt; pedestrians on the sidewalk.

frames.description: A man in a blue shirt enters from the bottom center, walking left. Other pedestrians are visible on the sidewalk.
frames.pedestrians: Man in blue shirt walking left; woman on sidewalk.

frames.description: The man in the blue shirt is moving across the road. The camera is passing another entrance point of the building.
frames.pedestrians: Man in blue shirt; several people sitting on the building steps.

frames.description: The man in the blue shirt is towards the left. The scene shows the consistent architecture of the long building.
frames.pedestrians: Man in blue shirt; people on the sidewalk.

frames.description: Multiple pedestrians are walking in different directions. The green and brown building continues on the right.
frames.pedestrians: Two men walking left; people on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The camera is nearing the end of the long building block. Pedestrians continue their movement.
frames.pedestrians: Men in blue shirts walking; others in background.

frames.description: A man in a blue shirt on a motorcycle enters from the bottom right. The sidewalk activity remains high.
frames.pedestrians: Rider on motorcycle; people walking and sitting on sidewalk.

frames.description: A white car is parked on the left side of the street. Text is now visible on the upper part of the building facade.
frames.signs: Building facade text: 'GURU NANAK EYE BANK'.
frames.vehicles: White Maruti Swift car parked on the left.
frames.pedestrians: A man in a blue shirt crossing left; people on the sidewalk.
frames.motion: Forward motion, passing the parked car.

frames.description: The camera passes the parked white car. A motorcyclist is visible in the distance. The eye bank building dominates the right view.
frames.vehicles: White car on left; motorcycle in distance.
frames.pedestrians: People walking on the sidewalk.

frames.description: The camera moves towards a junction. The building facade starts to recede. More vehicles are visible further ahead.
frames.vehicles: White car in the distance; motorcycle on the left.
frames.pedestrians: People scattered along the road and sidewalk.

frames.description: A signboard is visible on the right. The road opens up into a wider intersection area with trees and more infrastructure.
frames.signs: Signboard on the right: 'GURU NANAK EYE BANK' in English and 'ଗୁରୁ ନାନକ ଆଖି ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ' in Odia (Guru Nanak Akhi Bank).
frames.vehicles: White car ahead; motorcycle on the left.
frames.pedestrians: People walking across the intersection area.
frames.infrastructure: Signboards, street lights, trees, road junction.

frames.description: The camera is now in a more open area, possibly a circle or major intersection. A statue under a pavilion is visible on the left. A red car is parked nearby.
frames.signs: Yellow sign on a post on the left: Circular 'No Parking' symbol with Odia text 'ନୋ ପାର୍କିଂ' (No Parking). Blue directional sign in the background.
frames.pedestrians: Several people standing or walking near the park/statue area.
frames.infrastructure: Statue under a white canopy pavilion, park fence, intersection.
frames.motion: Forward motion, approaching a park area.

frames.description: The camera moves closer to the statue pavilion. A motorcyclist in a white shirt passes the camera.
frames.vehicles: Motorcycle moving right; red car parked.
frames.pedestrians: People walking on the sidewalk and in the park.
frames.infrastructure: Statue pavilion, street light poles, park greenery.

frames.description: Clearer view of the statue pavilion and the surrounding park. Another 'No Parking' sign is visible.
frames.signs: Sign on the left: 'NO PARKING' in English and 'ନୋ ପାର୍କିଂ' in Odia.
frames.vehicles: Red car parked on the right edge of the road.
frames.pedestrians: People walking along the park fence.
frames.infrastructure: Park with statue under pavilion, sidewalk with striped curb.

frames.description: Final frame showing the park and statue on the left. The pavilion is white with traditional tiered-roof elements. Some people are resting near its base.
frames.vehicles: Part of a red car is visible on the right.
frames.pedestrians: People near the statue; man walking in foreground.
frames.infrastructure: Park, statue pavilion, electric poles with multiple wires.
